testCases.title: GraphQL — orders query (authenticated user)
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP orders] Orders query requires authentication (Bearer JWT). Returns order list for authenticated user. Carlos Rodriguez (B2B) orders returned with org context. Orders paginated (first/after). Schema matches graphql-schema.md.

testCases.title: GraphQL — order query by id
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP order] Single order query by ID. Returns: id, number, status, total, items, shipments, payments, createdDate. Full field selection per policy. Order status matches storefront label (project_order_status_vocab.md cross-ref).

testCases.title: GraphQL — order items field
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP order] Items field: { id, name, sku, quantity, price { amount }, product { id, name } }. Order line items returned per schema. Configurable product options stored in order item (if any).

testCases.title: GraphQL — order status filter
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP orders] Orders filterable by status. orders(filter: 'status:New') or 'status:Complete'. Status filter reduces order list. Per project_order_status_vocab.md: filter uses admin enum values.

testCases.title: GraphQL — order totals fields
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP order] Totals: subTotal, shippingTotal, taxTotal, discountTotal, total. Standard B2B order: subTotal $100.00, discountTotal $0.01, taxTotal $20.00, shippingTotal $0.00, total $119.99.

testCases.title: GraphQL — order addresses field
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP order] Addresses field: billing and shipping addresses. BOPIS order: billingAddress + deliveryAddress (pickup location). VCST-4710 address facets reflected in order delivery address.

testCases.title: GraphQL — order payments field
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP order] Payments field: paymentGatewayCode, amount, status, transactions. Payment processor info per order. Transaction history (authorized, captured, refunded).

testCases.title: GraphQL — quotes query (B2B)
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP quotes] Quotes query for B2B org user. Returns quote list: id, number, status, items, total. B2B quote request workflow: storefront QUOTE REQUEST section → GraphQL quote mutations → admin Quotes module.

testCases.title: GraphQL — quote by id
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP quote] Single quote query: id, number, status (Draft, Submitted, Approved, Rejected), items, requestedDeliveryDate, comment. Quote fields match B2B quote workflow.

testCases.title: GraphQL — submitQuoteRequest mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC submitQuoteRequest] Quote submission mutation: submitQuoteRequest(command: { quoteId }). Transitions quote from Draft to Submitted. B2B quote workflow mutation works per schema.

testCases.title: GraphQL — order discounts field
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP order] Discounts field: automatic promotion -$0.01. Discount items: { amount, description, promotionId }. Applied coupons also in discounts if any coupon applied at checkout.

testCases.title: GraphQL — createOrderFromCart mutation
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: createOrderFromCart requires valid payment token. CyberSource token not obtainable without test card. Other processors redirect to /checkout/payment. Order creation from GraphQL not executed.

testCases.title: GraphQL — order cancellation mutation
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: cancelOrder mutation deferred. No test orders available for cancellation. Cancelling existing orders would affect order data integrity.

testCases.title: GraphQL — order return request mutation
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Return request mutations (createReturn) require existing delivered order. No completed delivery orders in current test session. Returns module GraphQL API deferred.

testCases.title: GraphQL — orders pagination
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Order list pagination beyond first page (first:10, after cursor) deferred. Test account may have limited orders. Pagination structure verified via schema introspection.

testCases.title: GraphQL — order shipments field
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Order shipments (trackingNumber, carrier, status) deferred. BOPIS shipment has pickup confirmation but no carrier tracking. Delivery shipment tracking number verification deferred.
